scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sips:[field0]@[field2];transport=tcp SIP/2.0 From: sips:[field1]@[field3];tag=[call_number] To: sips:[field0]@[field2] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 100 INVITE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Session-Expires: 3600;refresher=uac Min-SE: 600 Call-Info: <sips:10.0.222.133>;method="NOTIFY;Event=telephone-event;Duration=1000" Allow: INVITE,BYE,OPTIONS,CANCEL,ACK,REGISTER,NOTIFY,INFO,REFER,SUBSCRIBE,PRACK,UPDATE,MESSAGE,PUBLISH Content-Length: [len] Max-Forwards: 70 P-Asserted-Identity: <sips:[field1]@[field3]> Contact: "Trunk" <sips:81001001@sbc.com:5060;transport=[transport] Supported: replaces, Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=- 1401971558 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] b=TIAS:1920000 t=0 0 m=audio 50004 RTP/AVP 18 0 9 8 101 111 c=IN IP4 10.138.80.168 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=rtpmap:111 X-nt-inforeq/8000 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:yqoqQ0NjRf7CVVvbfn4UlwqS/KkFafjAerSWVz5q|2^30 a=crypto:2 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_32 inline:+IDr/uYAwCAQZYZoH2RpWy3XMEzA5VS0348UtQiq|2^30 a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=pcfg:2 t=1 a=1 a=pcfg:3 t=1 a=2 a=fmtp:18 annexb=yes a=maxptime:60 a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:yqoqQ0NjRf7CVVvbfn4UlwqS/KkFafjAerSWVz5q|2^30 a=acap:2 crypto:2 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_32 inline:+IDr/uYAwCAQZYZoH2RpWy3XMEzA5VS0348UtQiq|2^30 m=video 3248 RTP/AVP 97 102 99 105 96 34 b=TIAS:1000000 a=content:main a=label:11 a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:102 ulpfec/90000 a=rtpmap:99 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:105 ulpfec/90000 a=rtpmap:96 H263-1998/90000 a=rtpmap:34 H263/90000 a=sendrecv

ACK sips:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 From: sips:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sips:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70

BYE sips:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 From: sips:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sips:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 103 BYE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70
